{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Elder powers
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Elder powers]] are considered dangerous to mess with in the dark of a strange town.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has shown no cooperation with the [[Elder powers]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
